prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild, Mika Emberlane in a cropped travel jacket and Mika Mistfell in a rolled-sleeve apron; Mika Emberlane spreads a large, weathered map across a sturdy wooden table, pointing to a marked location in the deep ruins, while Mika Mistfell leans in closely to inspect the details, warm guild lighting, cinematic focus, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Mika Mistfell retrieves a brass compass from his tool belt and places it precisely on the map to calculate distance, while Mika Emberlane nods in agreement and traces a navigation route with a finger, both characters maintaining a focused and cooperative posture, no text, no watermark.
